name: Parrot and Baby Weighted Plush Kids' Throw Pillow Pink - Pillowfort™
description: Bring cute birds to your kid's space with the Parrot and Baby Weighted Plush Kids' Throw Pillow from Pillowfort™. Designed in the shape of a parrot and baby, this figural throw pillow comes complete with a tail, eyes and beak detailing for a sweet look. This plush throw pillow feels so soft as they cuddle, and makes a perfect gift for any kid. Suitable for ages 3 years and above, this pink throw pillow is not intended to be used for infants, and not microwave safe.
